---
title: "Interface"
---

This section covers the design of zen-do's interface and the reasoning
behind some key design decisions. It is organised into the following
documents:

- [Inputs](inputs.qmd): The metadata (as `.toml`), file(s), and token
  accepted.
- [Outputs](outputs.qmd): The outputs produced, including other file
  formats for the metadata, a Zenodo record (or at least the post to
  their servers), and Zenodo deposit information from an account.
- [Command Line Interface](cli.qmd): The main entry point for using
  zen-do and interacting with Zenodo.
